privileged_info_summary: The task is entrypoint_debugging@1 with 5 services/configuration endpoints. The project directory is /home/ga/entrypoint-debug created by the setup script. Gateway service listens on port 8080 and is configured to proxy to the API at api:5000. API service listens on port 5000 with a /health endpoint. Worker service is configured to run with a 5-second interval via the command argument ["--interval", "5"]. All three services (gateway, api, worker) are defined in docker-compose.yml. The verification script checks: (1) gateway HTTP response at localhost:8080, (2) API health check response at localhost:5000/health, (3) worker logs contain "interval=5" to verify the 5-second interval is being used.
